title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Becton Dickinson India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Becton Dickinson India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Becton Dickinson India in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Becton Dickinson India:
Becton Dickinson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Becton Dickinson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
